‍Legal & Compliance Information for Beraborrow

UPDATED: 03 March 2025

GEO-BLOCKED COUNTRIES

GEO-BLOCKED COUNTRIES

Beraborrow does not permit access to individuals or entities located in, incorporated in, or otherwise associated with the following countries or regions due to regulatory uncertainty, sanctions, or elevated compliance risk:

  • Afghanistan (AF)
  • Algeria (DZ)
  • Belarus (BY)
  • Burundi (BI)
  • Central African Republic (CF)
  • China (CN)
  • Congo, the Democratic Republic of the (CD)
  • Cote D'Ivoire (CI)
  • Cuba (CU)
  • Eritrea (ER)
  • Iran, Islamic Republic of (IR)
  • Iraq (IQ)
  • Korea, Democratic People's Republic of (North Korea) (KP)
  • Lebanon (LB)
  • Liberia (LR)
  • Libya (LY)
  • Mali (ML)
  • Morocco (MA)
  • Myanmar (Burma) (MM)
  • Nicaragua (NI)
  • Palestinian Territories (PS)
  • Russian Federation (RU)
  • Somalia (SO)
  • South Sudan (SS)
  • Sudan (SD)
  • Syrian Arab Republic (SY)
  • Turkey (TR)
  • United Kingdom (GB)
  • United States of America (US)
    Venezuela, Bolivarian Republic of (VE)
  • Yemen (YE)
  • Zimbabwe (ZW)

Use of the application in any of the above jurisdictions is strictly prohibited.

TERMS OF SERVICE

1. Definitions

  • "Application" refers to the Beraborrow decentralized borrowing protocol, accessible via app.beraborrow.com and associated frontends.
  • "User" refers to any individual or entity interacting with the Application.
  • "Digital Assets" refer to cryptocurrencies and tokens used on or with the Application.

2. Eligibility You must be at least 18 years old and possess the legal authority to enter into binding agreements. By using this application, you confirm that you meet these criteria and are not located in a geo-blocked jurisdiction.

3. Risk of Loss All transactions conducted through this application are real, irreversible, and final. Digital assets used within this application hold real-world value and can be lost permanently due to human error, smart contract vulnerabilities, network failures, or other unforeseen circumstances. You are solely responsible for managing your private keys, wallet security, and transaction decisions.

4. No Guarantees, No Warranties This application is provided "as is" and "as available", without any warranties or guarantees, whether express, implied, statutory, or otherwise. This includes but is not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, accuracy, or reliability.

5. Security & Smart Contract Risks Despite rigorous security measures, smart contracts may contain vulnerabilities that could be exploited, resulting in loss of funds. Risks include:

  • Contract exploits or bugs
  • Impermanent loss or market volatility
  • Malicious third-party attacks
  • Regulatory changes affecting your jurisdiction

6. No Financial Advice This application does not provide financial, legal, or tax advice. You are solely responsible for conducting your own research and consulting with appropriate professionals before participating.

7. Regulatory & Compliance Responsibility You are responsible for ensuring your use of this application complies with all applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction. We disclaim any responsibility for legal consequences arising from your usage.

8. Prohibited Activities You agree not to:

  • Use the application to engage in illegal activities
  • Exploit smart contract vulnerabilities
  • Participate in money laundering or financing of terrorism
  • Attempt to circumvent geo-blocking restrictions

9. Intellectual Property All rights to the Beraborrow brand, logos, design, and associated intellectual property are owned by Base Zero Labs Ltd unless otherwise stated. Unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.

10. Third-Party Links & Integrations The Application may link to third-party services (e.g., wallets, bridges). We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or functionality of these external platforms.

11. Token Disclaimer POLLEN is a utility tokens used within the Beraborrow ecosystem. It is not an investment products and does not represent ownership or equity in any entity.

12. Indemnification You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Beraborrow, its developers, contributors, and affiliated parties from any claims or damages arising from your use of the application or violation of these terms.

13. Legal Recourse Waiver By using this application, you expressly agree that you have no legal recourse against Beraborrow or its operators for any losses or liabilities incurred. You accept full responsibility for all risks.

14. Limitation of Liability To the maximum extent permitted by law, Beraborrow shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages related to your use of the application.

15. Force Majeure We are not liable for any delay or failure in performance due to causes beyond our reasonable control, including acts of God, cyberattacks, or changes in laws.

16. Updates & Changes These terms may be updated at any time without notice. Continued use constitutes acceptance of any modifications. Check this page periodically for updates.

17. Jurisdiction & Governing Law These terms are governed by the laws of the British Virgin Islands. Disputes shall be resolved in BVI courts unless otherwise agreed.

COOKIES POLICY

Use of Cookies We use cookies to enhance user experience, analyze platform performance, and provide essential features. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.

Types of Cookies

  • Essential Cookies – Necessary for core functions like authentication and security
  • Analytics Cookies – Help us understand user behavior to improve performance
  • Preference Cookies – Store user settings for a personalized experience

Managing Cookies

  • By clicking "Accept All", you consent to the use of all cookies
  • By clicking "Accept Essential Only", only essential cookies will be used

Contact For any questions or concerns regarding these terms, please email us at legal@beraborrow.com

‍
